content.en:
Infinite Domain.

After Ye Tian came back, he gave some of the resources to his son Ye Xingchen.

Ye Xingchen also took the path of the strongest and most powerful, but his son didn't copy his talent, so he couldn't open up like himself, so he could only supply resources as much as possible to let his son's cultivation improve quickly.

There is also a part for wives, daughters, and the Terran Temple, and the Tianshan Pavilion and Taisu Palace have also been allocated resources.

This time, he was able to enter the Heavenly Blood Battlefield with the help of Taisu Palace, so he couldn't give no benefit at all!

Anyway, this little resource is nothing to him.

"Another replica is back!"

Tear and pull!

The barrier of the Infinite Domain was torn apart, and Ye Tian's copy body came back, bringing back all those purple stones.

With these purple stones, his Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule could definitely skyrocket significantly.

Of course, he was definitely not sure about being promoted to the sixth sequence to the realm of ten percent of the Dao rules, but he could definitely be promoted to the realm of several percent of the Dao rules.

"Let's start enlightenment!"

Ye Tian swallowed a purple stone, and while eroding the origin, he also silently comprehended the rules of the sixth sequence of the Dao.

He didn't use those high-quality purple stones at first, and when the low-quality purple stones were exhausted, he used high-quality purple stones.

Gradually, the years passed.

Before you know it, the years of the Thousand Solstice Age have passed.

For Ye Tian, the Thousand Dao Era years were a long time.

"The Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have been raised to the realm of sixty percent, but those purple stones are also running out!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, his current strength has improved too much compared to the past.

He has also created a lot of Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Powers, but his cultivation is still in the middle stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm, and at his level, even if he has countless resources, it is impossible to ascend to the late stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm in a short period of time.

However, his current strength is that he has truly reached the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and it is not an ordinary Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm.

"I have to go to the first strange place of the Infinite Domain to take a look at the forbidden place, the supreme Dao strange thing inside, with my current strength plus the blood pattern tablet, there should be hope to kill it!" Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

Ye Tian's duplicate body entered the first strange forbidden strange land together.

After entering, he was quickly targeted by the only Dao Strange Thing in the First Strange Land.

The strange figure, from the top of his head to the strange stone, appeared in Ye Tian's perception.

It exudes the aura of the eightfold Supreme Dao realm, and it also has the extremely rich Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't have the slightest power to resist it, but now he is not afraid.

"Blood Tattoo Tablet!"

Ye Tian urged this treasure and tried to suppress this supreme strange thing, but the effect was not very good.

"The grade of the Blood Pattern Tablet is low, and it is difficult to weaken the strength of this supreme Dao strange thing too much, but it can be regarded as weakening some strength. Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, the other replica bodies all came up and besieged this supreme artifact.

Thundered!!!!!

The battle broke out!

I have to say that the strength of this supreme strange thing is really terrifying, completely crushing Ye Tian, if it is a single copy of the body, it really can't be beaten, and it will even be killed.

But under the siege of multiple replica bodies, it can barely compete.

"Burning Origin!"

Ye Tian began to fight for his life.

The origin burns, and the combat power of the copy body skyrockets, and then frantically attacks to the Dodge.

The rules shattered, and the heavens and the earth overturned.

Broken regular silk threads swept across the First Strange Land, smashing the territory everywhere.

Soon, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies was too seriously injured and was killed by the Dao Strange Thing.

But this supreme strange object was also not lightly injured, and the black stone appeared a little crack, affecting the power of the strange figure.

"One more replica body!"

Airplanes!

Another newly condensed replica body participates in the battle.

In this way, Ye Tian sacrificed a replica body, making the strength of the Dao Strange Thing weaker and weaker, and the injuries became more and more serious.

After sacrificing six replica bodies, this supreme artifact was finally shattered, and the strange figure completely dissipated.

Wow!

Ye Tian grabbed it and grasped a bead in the core of the stone, this bead was a supreme dao strange item, and its interior contained an unimaginable sixth sequence of supreme dao rules.

"This Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item is still useful to me, and with the remaining purple stones, there should be hope to advance my Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to the Seventy Percent realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

......

Next, Ye Tian collected the resources of the first strange land.

It's barely ever explored, and the resources are incomparably large, and many of them are of some use to him.

After a period of time, Ye Tian scraped the resources here, so he chose to leave.

After going back.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and used resources to improve his cultivation strength.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

It is worth mentioning that the Infinite Domain has given birth to two more Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms, one from the Taisu Palace and one from the Hatredless Holy Land.

They didn't break through with Ye Tian's help, but they scraped the resources of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and they broke through.

As for the sixfold to the Dao realm and the fivefold to the Dao realm, the number of breakthroughs is even more.

The entire Infinite Domain is slowly returning to its previous level, and without the oppression of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, the major forces are showing a thriving prosperity.

However, Taisu Palace and other forces were not too happy, and everyone was very nervous.

Because as the years go by, the day of the catastrophe is getting closer and closer.

The last catastrophe was in the ancient era of the Infinite Domain, and that time the Infinite Domain suffered heavy losses, and the only one of the Eightfold Dao Realm fell, which led to the invasion of the Infinite Domain by the later Infinite Heavenly Palace.

At that time, it was not called the Infinite Domain, but the Xuantian Domain.

Taisu Palace and other forces use the name Xuantian Alliance to commemorate the Xuantian Domain.

However, Taisu Palace has no way to change the name of the Wuji Domain now, and it is very difficult to restore the name of the Xuantian Domain.

At the beginning, the Wuji Heavenly Palace was renamed the Wuji Domain, and it also paid a great price to get the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to agree.

It's more difficult to change it back.

......

The Taisu Palace, as well as the other forces, as well as the representatives of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, all gathered together.

Ye Tian also participated.

It's just because this time it's to determine the number of people who will participate in the catastrophe.

At this time, many of the Sevenfold Dao Realms were very worried, after all, they didn't want to go.

Although Ye Tian was the most powerful, he was still the Taisu Palace Master who was leading this meeting.

The Taisu Palace Master said, "Everyone, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has contacted us and asked us to give us a list. In short, the requirement of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is that we in the Infinite Domain must mobilize at least thirty sevenfold supreme Dao realms, and more than 200,000 threefold supreme Dao realms, which is the minimum requirement. "
